basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Municipal Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out, Apply Online Starts July 27
basic_details.department: Urban Development and Urban Housing Department
basic_details.short_information: GSSSB Municipal Engineer Recruitment 2026: The Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) has released the GSSSB Municipal Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification for the post of Municipal Engineer, Class-3 under the Urban Development and Urban Housing Department, Government of Gujarat. This recruitment offers an excellent opportunity for Civil Engineering graduates seeking a government job in the Gujarat state government sector.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 22 July 2026 Online Application Start Date: 27 July 2026 (2:00 PM) Online Application Last Date: 10 August 2026 (11:59 PM) Last Date to Pay Application Fee: 13 August 2026 (11:59 PM) Tentative Exam Date: January 2027 (not yet confirmed by GSSSB)

application_fee.details: Fees must be paid online only, via debit card, internet banking, UPI, or wallet, by 13 August 2026 (11:59 PM). Fees are refunded only to candidates who actually appear for the examination.

age_limit.details: Minimum age: 18 years; Maximum age: 35 years. | Category Age Relaxation Maximum Age Limit General category women 5 years 40 years Reserved category men 5 years 40 years Reserved category women 10 years 45 years General category PWD men 10 years 45 years General category PWD women 15 years 45 years Reserved category PWD men 15 years 45 years Reserved category PWD women 20 years 45 years Ex-servicemen Service period + 3 years As applicable

qualification.details: The candidate must be a citizen of India or possess nationality as per Rule-7 of the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967. | A Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering or Technology from a recognized university/institution, or an equivalent qualification recognized by the Government. Basic knowledge of Computer Applications as prescribed under the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967. Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi, or both. | Candidates holding a degree in any of the following equivalent disciplines are also eligible: Civil Engineering, Construction Technology and Management, Construction Engineering and Management, Highway Engineering, Transportation Engineering, Water Resource Engineering, Urban Planning, Environmental Engineering, Structural Engineering and Construction Management, Town and Country Planning, and related specializations listed in the official notification (38 disciplines in total). | Minimum age: 18 years; Maximum age: 35 years.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will initially be appointed on a fixed monthly pay of ₹49,600 for the first five years. After five years of satisfactory service, candidates will be placed in the regular 7th Pay Commission pay scale of ₹39,900 to ₹1,26,600 (Level-7), subject to conditions laid down in the relevant government resolutions.

selection_process: Indian Constitution, Current Affairs, Gujarati & English Comprehension 30
Selection will be based on a single-stage objective MCQ competitive examination (CBRT/OMR)
120 in Part-B) Total duration: 3 hours (180 minutes)
combined for both parts Negative marking: 1/4th mark deducted for each wrong answer Minimum qualifying standard: 40% separately in both Part-A and Part-B
Candidates who qualify will be called for document verification (roughly twice the number of vacancies per category)
after which the final merit-based selection list and waiting list will be published.
how_to_apply: Go to "Online Application", click "Apply", and select GSSSB.
Click on Advertisement No. 440/2026-27, Municipal Engineer, Class-3, then click "Apply Now".
Fill in Personal Details and Educational Details as required.
Accept the declaration/assurance and save the application to generate the Application Number.
Upload photograph (5 cm height x 3.6 cm width) and signature (2.5 cm height x 7.5 cm width) in JPG format (up to 15 KB each).
Click "Confirm Application" after verifying all details carefully - no changes are allowed after confirmation.
Pay the application fee online and download/print the fee receipt.
Download and save the final application form printout for future reference.
important_instructions: Only one application should be submitted; if multiple applications are submitted, the last confirmed application (with fee paid) will be considered valid. Category (caste) details cannot be changed once the application is confirmed. Reserved category candidates applying against unreserved posts will not get age or other relaxation benefits. Widowed women candidates get 5% additional marks added to their merit score, subject to conditions specified in the notification. Candidates with recognized sporting achievements (national/international, inter-university, or All India School Games Federation level) in specified sports are eligible for 5% additional marks, subject to producing valid certificates. Candidates with benchmark disabilities and difficulty in writing may apply for scribe/compensatory time facility by emailing [email protected] at least two days before the exam, along with required documents. The exam is covered under the Gujarat Public Examination (Prevention of Unfair Means) Act, 2023; any violation will invite legal action.

Candidates with a degree in Civil Engineering can also explore more Civil Engineering Government Jobs and Gujarat Government Jobs. Those interested in similar technical recruitment can check GSSSB Class-3 Recruitment notifications and other Municipal and Urban Development Department Jobs across India.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Municipal Engineer Recruitment 2026 – Quick Overview

rows.details: Urban Development and Urban Housing Department

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Municipal Engineer Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Release Date: 22 July 2026 Online Application Start Date: 27 July 2026 (2:00 PM) Online Application Last Date: 10 August 2026 (11:59 PM) Last Date to Pay Application Fee: 13 August 2026 (11:59 PM) Tentative Exam Date: January 2027 (not yet confirmed by GSSSB)

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Municipal Engineer Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: GSSSB has announced 50 vacancies for Municipal Engineer, Class-3 across Gujarat municipalities. The category-wise breakup is as follows:

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Municipal Engineer Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: The candidate must be a citizen of India or possess nationality as per Rule-7 of the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967. A Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering or Technology from a recognized university/institution, or an equivalent qualification recognized by the Government. Basic knowledge of Computer Applications as prescribed under the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967. Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi, or both. Candidates holding a degree in any of the following equivalent disciplines are also eligible: Civil Engineering, Construction Technology and Management, Construction Engineering and Management, Highway Engineering, Transportation Engineering, Water Resource Engineering, Urban Planning, Environmental Engineering, Structural Engineering and Construction Management, Town and Country Planning, and related specializations listed in the official notification (38 disciplines in total). Minimum age: 18 years; Maximum age: 35 years.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Municipal Engineer Salary Structure 2026
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will initially be appointed on a fixed monthly pay of ₹49,600 for the first five years. After five years of satisfactory service, candidates will be placed in the regular 7th Pay Commission pay scale of ₹39,900 to ₹1,26,600 (Level-7) , subject to conditions laid down in the relevant government resolutions.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Municipal Engineer Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: Fees must be paid online only, via debit card, internet banking, UPI, or wallet, by 13 August 2026 (11:59 PM). Fees are refunded only to candidates who actually appear for the examination.

rows.category: Reserved categories (Women of all categories, SEBC, SC, ST, EWS, PWD, Ex-servicemen)

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Municipal Engineer Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on a single-stage objective MCQ competitive examination (CBRT/OMR), divided into two parts: Total questions: 210 (90 in Part-A, 120 in Part-B) Total duration: 3 hours (180 minutes), combined for both parts Negative marking: 1/4th mark deducted for each wrong answer Minimum qualifying standard: 40% separately in both Part-A and Part-B Candidates who qualify will be called for document verification (roughly twice the number of vacancies per category), after which the final merit-based selection list and waiting list will be published.

rows.part: Indian Constitution, Current Affairs, Gujarati & English Comprehension

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for GSSSB Municipal Engineer Recruitment
content_sections.text: Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets Birth date proof / school leaving certificate Category certificate (SC/ST/SEBC/EWS), where applicable Non-Creamy Layer certificate (for SEBC candidates) Income and Asset Certificate (for EWS candidates) Disability certificate (for PWD candidates, where applicable) Ex-servicemen discharge/identity documents (where applicable) Computer knowledge certificate, diploma/degree, or relevant mark sheet Recent passport-size photograph (white background) and signature in JPG format

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Municipal Engineer Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only one application should be submitted; if multiple applications are submitted, the last confirmed application (with fee paid) will be considered valid. Category (caste) details cannot be changed once the application is confirmed. Reserved category candidates applying against unreserved posts will not get age or other relaxation benefits. Widowed women candidates get 5% additional marks added to their merit score, subject to conditions specified in the notification. Candidates with recognized sporting achievements (national/international, inter-university, or All India School Games Federation level) in specified sports are eligible for 5% additional marks, subject to producing valid certificates. Candidates with benchmark disabilities and difficulty in writing may apply for scribe/compensatory time facility by emailing [email protected] at least two days before the exam, along with required documents. The exam is covered under the Gujarat Public Examination (Prevention of Unfair Means) Act, 2023; any violation will invite legal action. Candidates with a degree in Civil Engineering can also explore more Civil Engineering Government Jobs and Gujarat Government Jobs . Those interested in similar technical recruitment can check GSSSB Class-3 Recruitment notifications and other Municipal and Urban Development Department Jobs across India.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in GSSSB Municipal Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 50 vacancies for the post of Municipal Engineer, Class-3.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for GSSSB Municipal Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application last date is 10 August 2026 (11:59 PM).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for GSSSB Municipal Engineer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering/Technology or an equivalent recognized qualification, along with basic computer knowledge and knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for GSSSB Municipal Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 35 years of age as on 10 August 2026, with relaxation applicable for reserved categories, women, and PWD candidates as per rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary of GSSSB Municipal Engineer?
faq.answer: Selected candidates get a fixed pay of ₹49,600 per month for the first 5 years, after which they move to the regular Level-7 pay scale of ₹39,900–₹1,26,600.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for GSSSB Municipal Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹500 for unreserved category candidates and ₹400 for reserved category candidates (women of all categories, SC, ST, SEBC, EWS, PWD, and Ex-servicemen).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for GSSSB Municipal Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a single-stage objective MCQ examination (CBRT/OMR) consisting of Part-A (90 marks) and Part-B (120 marks), with negative marking of 1/4th mark per wrong answer.

faq.question: Q8. When is the GSSSB Municipal Engineer exam likely to be held?
faq.answer: As per the notification, the exam is tentatively planned for January 2027; the exact date will be announced separately on the GSSSB website.
